---
title: "Blog"
listing:
  contents: blog
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields: [title, date, categories, description]
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  feed:
    items: 10
    type: partial
---

Sosyal girişimcilik, sosyal politika, emek piyasaları ve akademik çalışmalar üzerine notlarım.

<hr>

<h3>Newsletter Subscription</h3>

<p>
Stay updated with my latest research, blog posts, and insights on
social entrepreneurship, social policy, and labor markets.
</p>

<iframe 
  src="https://volkanisiklab.substack.com/embed"
  width="100%"
  height="320"
  style="border: 1px solid #EEE; background: white"
  frameborder="0"
  scrolling="no">
</iframe>
